titleStmt.title: SII 41.81: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 81. (A.R. No. 80 of 1905.) Sōḻavandāṉ, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Janakanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ temple at Sōḻavandāṉ.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavaman Sundara-pāṇḍya II, Year 2 = 1240 A.D.

summary.p: This is the king's order remitting the mākkalam tax towards viniyōgam by the sabhā of Chōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam during both the perumpū and kuṟuvai cropping seasons on the occasion of his coronation anniversary. This was made on representation by the king's senior officer Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum poruceyamaṭantaiyun tāmaraik kuvimulaic
ceyappuyattiruppa vētanāviṉ veḷḷitaḻ tāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpe
ṟat tiḷaippa veṇṭiraiyuṭutta maṇṭiṇik kiṭakait tirunilamaṭantaiyuri
maiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiya nītiyun tarumamun taḻaippa yimaiyavar viḻāk ko
ṭi yiṭantoṟumeṭuppak karuṅkalik kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyararun to
ḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷaṟpak curutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulavap po
rutiṟalāḻi pūtaliñcūḻavar rorukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭairāvata muta
l ceyiṟtir koṟṟat teṇṭicaiyāṉai yetta meṟk kaṇṭa nāṭemateṉa
k kayal kaḷikūrak kocalan tuḷuvaṅ kutiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam
puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅkamiḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ keḷaṭateliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉa mutalā viti
muṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyiṉ muṭipuṉai ventar toru
taṉināyaka ṉeṉṟulaketta tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅkoloccik koṟṟattāḷ
kkuḷirk kuṭai niḻaṟkaṟṟaik kavari kāvalar vica miṭaikatir navamaṇi vi
ra simhāsaṉattuṭaṉ muṭicūṭiyuyarku tiruviṉ paṅkaiyamalaṟ karaṅkuvi
ttup pāttipar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭetir vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉiyiṟ cuṭaroḷi mau
lik cuṭarmaṇi meliṭac civantaṇai malar ciṟṟaṭik kamalamatukaraṅ kamalameṉṟu
lakumu lakamuḻutuṭayāroṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkomārapaṉmarāṉa tribhuva
ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundrarapāṇṭi tevarkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu
svastiśrīprasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa mukappaṭi [śrī komāṟa] panmarāṉa tribhuvana
cakravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ coḻakulāntakac caturvvedimaṅkala
ttu sabhaiyārkku taṅkaḷur perumpūvilum kuṟuvaiyilum mākkalameṉṟu
Iṟuttu varukiṟa nellu nam Abhiṣek kāla dharmmatāṉamāka Iraṇṭāva
tu mutal tavirap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉa
maiyil perumpūvilum kuṟuvaiyilum vanta
nellu nam Abhiṣeka kālattile Ivvāṇṭu mutal dharmmadāṉamāka tavirn
tu nilaippaṭac coṉṉom Ippaṭi cadrātivaṟ celvatāka kallilum ce
mpilum veṭṭuvittuk koḷka Ivai kulacekarauttaramantiri Eḻuttu .§ yā
ṇṭu 2 vatu nāḷ 1000 5 10 Ivai vijayarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimā ṉeḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 41.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
